untranslatable_reason: The signal requires pattern recognition for 'Abandoned Baby' candlestick pattern (three-candle formation with specific gap characteristics) and dynamic median calculation of candle height ratios. The allowed indicators do not include pattern detection or statistical median functions. The 'breakout_price' reference and comparative tall/short candle classification based on median percentile cannot be expressed with the available indicators (open, high, low, close, volume, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, Position, Previous Bar, Returns, Bar Props).
translation_notes: Created a placeholder SHORT entry based on available bar properties (range > median threshold) and exit on reversal above pattern high, but this does not capture the actual Abandoned Baby pattern logic. The signal requires: (1) Three-candle pattern identification, (2) Gap analysis between candles, (3) Median calculation across a dataset, (4) Ratio-based classification. A proper backtest engine would need custom pattern recognition functions or additional indicator support.
